title: 皐月賞の後に・メラメラなんばーわん

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Right after the race...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aaahhhhh...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I loooost! Urghhh...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sob... Traineeer...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I knew it was a stretch, but I... I wanted to win so bad!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon looks truly disappointed, emotions
heightened by the amount of effort she put in.
Nonetheless...
choice_data_list: The stage is still waiting for you.
The stage is still waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...That's true. I can't forget about the concert. My
fans are waiting for me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go dance! And since I'm an Umadol, I'll
do it with a smile on my face!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Drying her tears, she takes her place in the
winning concert before a packed venue. The
performance is nothing short of amazing.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So this... this is the top stage!

text_block_list.name: Center Umamusume
text_block_list.text: La, la, laaa! ♪

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
You're amazing!
Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's where I really wanted to be... There in the
center...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: No, I will stand there. Next time, it's going to be me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The concert comes to a close, and Smart Falcon
returns a little happier than when she left.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I sang my heart out, Trainer!
choice_data_list: How was the view from the top?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Totally amazing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
No, that doesn't even scratch the surface. I'm not
sure how to describe it...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, it was so bright up there! The spotlights,
the crowd and their glowsticks. Everything I could
see was shining...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't help but wonder, what if all those lights
were shining on me? That must be the best feeling
ever.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And that's why I've decided I wanna stand on a
big stage again.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But next time, it's gotta be the biggest stage on
dirt!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want to see that same dazzling performance and
huge, cheering audience... but at a dirt race!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: And of course, I want to be the one in the center!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After experiencing the winning concert of a
Classic race, she's even more determined to
become the top Umadol on dirt.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. I wanna try a G1 dirt race next!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My rookie days are over. It's time to take my next
step as an Umadol.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And that step... is to get up on a stage that'll
make me known all over the country.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I wanna run more G1 races like the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite today's disappointment, there's no
doubting Smart Falcon's abilities on dirt. She
surely has what it takes to compete against the
powerful runners the G1 races attract. In which
case...
choice_data_list: How about the Japan Dirt Derby?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a race reserved only for classic-year racers,
just like the Satsuki Sho, and one I'd love to see
her win.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good to me! Really, I'm good with
anything as long as it's a G1!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's not a lot of G1 dirt races out there... So
I've gotta get on every stage I can!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Next stop, the Japan Dirt Derby and the top of
the dirt world! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is decided. Japan Dirt Derby, here
we come!
